raw_consumer_statement: The cashier at self checkout was helping me and did not return my card and I didnt realize till weeks later when I received emails saying there were new charges on my card and I hadnt used it again since the initial charge. When I called the store they referred me to the credit card company who told me that they would take care of it but they havent and Im now receiving collection letters. I have asked the store to pull the cashiers information from the receipt because that has to be where the fraud was initiated. Ive asked them to pull video footage to confirm and prosecute this fraud and they are not calling me back. Please help. Thank you
